workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (Template HR-F origin journeys)

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-F (~1,800 words). UK patients pay £4,000–£12,000 domestically vs €1,500–€7,000 abroad. REQUIRED H2s: (1) Why UK Patients Travel, (2) Best Destinations (Turkey, Spain, Greece), (3) Cost Comparison UK vs Abroad, (4) Choosing a Clinic, (5) Travel Logistics, (6) NHS/Insurance Considerations, (7) Patient Stories, (8) FAQ. Link to all country guides and cost pages.

body.title: Hair Transplant Abroad for UK Patients: What You Need to Know
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Abroad from UK — Patient Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: UK patients save 50–70% on hair transplants abroad. Compare Turkey, Spain, and Greece costs, clinics, travel logistics, and what to expect.

body.notes: CONTENT BRIEF — Template HR-F (~1,800 words). US patients pay $8,000–$15,000 domestically. REQUIRED H2s: same as UK origin page adapted for US (insurance gaps, flight times, visa-free destinations). Link to Turkey, Spain, Greece guides.

body.title: Hair Transplant Abroad for US Patients: What You Need to Know
body.metaTitle: Hair Transplant Abroad from USA — Patient Guide | MedCover
body.metaDescription: US patients save thousands on hair transplants abroad. Compare Turkey, Spain, and Greece — costs, clinics, travel, and recovery timelines.
